creator: vhoffman@names.co.uk
text:
I'm not a maintainer or even a coder but I got bitten by this before.

The solution in the sort term is to disable gtpid labels
sysctl kern.geom.label.gptid.enable=0
Its somewhat annoying though and while I dont use gptid labels, some
people must.

an entry in one (all?) of the appropriate geom manpages might be an idea.


Vince
